creator: pst@Shockwave.COM
text:
The manual page for sh states that invoking a program with:

	program 2<<EOT
	some stuff
	EOT

should send the text down file descriptor #2 on the program.  It does not.

How-To-Repeat: 
#!/bin/sh
PGPPASSFD=2 pgp +batch=on -ft 2<<EOT
mysecretpassword
EOT

does not work

but

#!/bin/bash
PGPPASSFD=2 pgp +batch=on -ft 2<<EOT
mysecretpassword
EOT

does.
